content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — SettingsView.swift:12 shows user-facing toggle label "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" for the AI Sort feature.
Pierre: Apple reviewers scan for words like "experimental" as a signal that a feature is unfinished or beta-quality, which can trigger 2.2 rejections or clarification requests. This string is visible in the UI (not a comment/log), so it counts as store-facing copy implying an unfinished feature. Consider rewording to something like "May affect sort order" without the word "Experimental," or gate the caveat behind proper release-readiness language.
